title: Star Online Personalised Christmas Mug Custom Printed Intial Mug 11oz Ceramic Coffee Cup Xmas Eve Secert Santa Gifts for Kids, Friends & Family (Santa Hat Design)
features: Personalised Christmas Mug: Add a unique touch with a personalised intial, perfect for festive coffee, tea, or hot chocolate.
Christmas Novelty Gift: Ideal for Secret Santa, Xmas Eve, or holiday parties, this mug adds a cheerful touch to any celebration.
Dishwasher & Microwave Safe: Convenient 11oz ceramic mug that's easy to clean and reheat, making it practical for everyday use.
Perfect for Hot Chocolate: Ideal for enjoying hot chocolate with marshmallows, making Christmas mornings and winter nights extra special.
Compact Size: Measuring 9.5cm x 8cm, this mug is perfectly sized for your favourite holiday beverages and treats.
description: This Personalised Christmas Mug is a charming and unique ceramic mug, customised with your intial, making it a delightful novelty gift for festive drinks like coffee. Perfect for Secret Santa, Christmas Eve, or holiday parties, this 11oz mug is both dishwasher and microwave safe, ensuring easy cleaning and reheating. Ideal for enjoying hot chocolate with marshmallows, it adds a cosy touch to Christmas mornings and winter nights. Measuring 9.5cm x 8cm, its compact size makes it perfect for your favourite Christmas beverages.
